task_completion.description: Enable global anonymous access in Artifactory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Artifactory UI under Administration -> Security/User Management -> Settings showing the 'Allow Anonymous Access' checkbox checked, OR a terminal showing a successful REST API call enabling it.

task_completion.description: Create or modify a Permission Target applying to the target repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Artifactory UI showing a Permission Target configuration with 'example-repo-local' in the 'Included Repositories' list, OR a REST API payload targeting this repository.

task_completion.description: Configure the Permission Target to include the public path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Permission Target settings, the 'Include Patterns' field contains '**' or 'public/**' to allow access to the public folder.

task_completion.description: Configure the Permission Target to exclude the secret path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Permission Target settings, the 'Exclude Patterns' field contains 'secret/**' or 'secret/passwords.txt' to explicitly block access to the secret folder.

task_completion.description: Grant the anonymous user read-only access in the Permission Target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Permission Target 'Users' tab, the 'anonymous' user is added with ONLY the 'Read' permission checked. 'Deploy/Cache' and 'Delete/Overwrite' must be unchecked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real Artifactory instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8082 or terminal commands are directed to this URL.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration was actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Permission Target list with the newly created/modified target present, a success toast notification in the UI, or a successful HTTP 200/201 response in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open and being used to modify the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Artifactory instance is hosted at http://localhost:8082. The target repository is 'example-repo-local'. The public path that must be accessible is 'public/info.txt' (typically covered by 'public/**' or '**' include patterns) and the secret path that must be protected is 'secret/passwords.txt' (typically covered by 'secret/**' exclude pattern).
